My essay this morning is cautiously bullish as the market continues to show momentum while awaiting results from The US China trade talks.
Market monitor had a strong 300 plus green reading yesterday with both the five and ten day ratios over two, signaling a green light environment with more aggressive buying.
The t 2,108 increased from 66.60 to 68.02, also signaling strength.
The 20% study, however, leans bearish with approximately 100 on the bullish side and 20 on the bearish side signaling a potential pullback in the short term.
The major indices traded largely sideways yesterday awaiting the results of The US China trade tops.
Looking at the small caps, TNA and IWN both pushed higher outpacing the other major indices.
The Dow closed flat while the Nasdaq and S and P closed marginally higher.
Crypto stock closed largely green as Bitcoin bounced back towards all time highs.

Overall, my plan of action remains slow and deliberate risk taking on A plus quality EP 9,000,000 and delayed reaction setups, selling into strength and puling to account for anticipated volatility from headline risk.
